title: Tamil Nadu Assembly: Edappadi Palaniswami claims AIADMK rebel MLAs promised Cabinet berths for support to TVK govt.
description: AIADMK MLAs backing Mr. Palaniswami strongly objected to the Speaker J.C.D. Prabhakar calling S.P. Velumani, who heads a rebel group in the AIADMK, to speak on the motion.
